response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern cloud-native development. His recent roles in AI-agent infrastructure and senior-level positions align well with the role's requirements. While his backend experience with Kotlin/Java is limited, his polyglot background and deep technical expertise in primary and secondary stacks compensate significantly.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern web development
Proven track record in scalable systems, cloud platforms (AWS), and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes)
Strong problem-solving skills and commitment to software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews)
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services compared to primary stack
Primary experience in AI-agent infrastructure may not fully align with enterprise internal tooling focus
Mixed depth in relational databases (focus on MongoDB, less on PostgreSQL/MySQL)
